hero.title: China truck parts, sourced and checked by a dedicated export team.
hero.subtitle: crealink helps truck parts buyers in Africa, Middle East and South America quickly check reference prices for SINOTRUK, SHACMAN, FAW and other China truck brands – then turn your parts list into a clean RFQ.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Part number or name to check price

searchStrip.title: Look up heavy truck parts
searchStrip.description: Enter a part number or a keyword (brand, model, or name) to see reference prices. Results open on a dedicated page so you can bookmark or share the link. For formal quotes and lead times, contact us after your search.

search.title: Quick truck parts price check
search.example: Example: SINOTRUK / HOWO / SHACMAN / FAW truck parts.
search.noResults: No parts found for "{{query}}". Please try another number or keyword, or send us your RFQ.
search.pageSubtitle: Reference prices (indicative). Refine your query below.

parts.referenceNote: Reference prices, EXW China (for indication only)

partDetail.name: Name
partDetail.inquiryIntro: Request a formal quote, lead time, or MOQ for this part. Our team replies on WhatsApp during business hours.
partDetail.sharedImageNote: This image is shared as a reference only. Please confirm with the actual part.
partDetail.structuredP1: This listing covers {{brand}} part {{partNo}} ({{name}}) from our reference catalogue.
partDetail.structuredP2: Heavy truck and off-road applications differ by chassis, axle and engine family. Verify the part number against your vehicle records and technical documentation before ordering.
partDetail.structuredP3: The price shown is a reference price (EXW China). It excludes packing, freight, duties and banking fees. Contact us for a firm offer and delivery schedule.

seo.metaDescription: {{brand}} heavy-duty truck spare part {{partNo}} — {{name}}. Reference price {{price}} (EXW China, indicative). Contact Crealink for MOQ, lead time and formal quotation.
seo.schemaDescription: Aftermarket heavy-duty truck spare part, brand {{brand}}, part number {{partNo}}. Name: {{name}}. Reference price {{price}}, EXW China (indicative, not a binding offer). Crealink supplies SINOTRUK, SHACMAN, FAW and related China truck parts for export — request a quotation to confirm compatibility, packing, shipping and commercial terms.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Get in touch for parts quotes and export services.
contact.whatsAppNote: Scan the QR code to chat with our service team.
contact.address: 57 Lanxiang Road, Tianqiao District, Jinan City, Shandong Province, China

about.title: Why choose us
about.subtitle: We are a China-based team specializing in SINOTRUK aftermarket parts, supplying genuine OE components, high-value quality alternatives and turnkey export solutions.

feature.globalShippingDesc: We ship to Africa, Middle East, South America and more. Trackable logistics with reliable lead times.
feature.authenticDesc: Direct factory and authorized channels. Traceable sourcing and quality you can trust.
feature.realTimeQuoteDesc: Check reference prices online, get fast RFQ responses, and turn your list into a clear quote request.

business.title: Business scope
business.line1: SINOTRUK aftermarket parts · Heavy truck chassis · Engine and transmission assemblies
business.line2: Genuine OE and high-value quality alternatives · Export packing and logistics support

legal.title: Legal & compliance
legal.line1: Company registration and export qualifications available on request.
legal.line2: Data and quotations on this site are for reference only and do not constitute a formal offer.
